name: Fortune Cookies #1
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the cake flour, sugar, cornstarch, and salt.
2. Add the cooking oil and egg white; stir until smooth.
3. Gradually add the water, mixing well to form a batter.
4. Make one cookie at a time by pouring about 1 tablespoon of the batter onto a lightly greased skillet or griddle.
5. Spread the batter into a circle about 3 1/2 inches in diameter.
6. Cook over low heat for about 4 minutes, or until lightly browned on the bottom.
7. Using a wide spatula, turn the cookie and cook for an additional minute.
8. Quickly place the cookie on a pot holder.
9. Put a paper strip printed with a fortune in the center of the cookie.
10. Fold the cookie in half, then fold it again over the edge of the bowl.
11. Place the finished cookies in a muffin pan to cool.
